description: Implement the :::question block's rendering in Charter.Core so the Category=QuestionForm tests pass: classify a :::question container (Info=="question") to BlockKind.Question in CharterMarkdown.Describe, parse the body via QuestionSpec.Parse, and render a native HTML <form> whose controls match the mode (radio/checkbox/text/textarea/number/bool) with each option label, carrying the block's content-derived stable id and the question id for answer correlation; register the block id in SourceMap. Serialized after 08-implement-diff-block to avoid an overlapping-writeScope merge collision on the shared Describe/Render/SourceMap files; depends on 10-implement-question-schema for real parsing. Do NOT edit the tests.
